name: pihole
title: Pi-hole
description: Network-wide ad blocker acting as a DNS sinkhole. Blocks ads and trackers for every device on your network without client-side software. Beautiful admin dashboard with query logs and statistics.

variables.name: PORT_PIHOLE_WEB
variables.label: Web UI Port
variables.description: Port for the Pi-hole admin interface

variables.name: PIHOLE_WEBPASSWORD
variables.label: Web Password
variables.description: Password for the Pi-hole admin interface
